findings.title: Right-side JOIN input is disproportionately large

metadata_signals: left side estimated rows 210M before additional filter pushdown

recommendation.before_sql: SELECT e.user_id, e.event_time, d.segment_name FROM analytics.events AS e INNER JOIN dim.user_segments AS d ON e.user_id = d.user_id WHERE e.event_date >= toDate('2026-05-01') AND d.is_active = 1;
notes: Join algorithm and table role should be checked with environment settings.

findings.title: Evaluate dictionary or pre-filtered dimension access

evidence.matched_pattern: dimension join under heavy cardinality imbalance

notes: Validate semantics and operational cost before applying.
